title: Needed Me
lyrics: I was good on my own, that's the way it was
You was good on the low for a faded fuck
Shit, what the fuck you complainin' for?
Used to trip off that shit I was kickin' to you
Had some fun on the run though, I'll give it to you
But, baby, don't get it twisted
You was just another nigga on the hit list
Tryna fix your inner issues with a bad bitch
Didn't they tell you that I was a savage?
Fuck ya white horse and ya carriage
Never told you you could have it
You been rollin' around, shit, I'm rollin' up
Break it down, like a pound, shit was never us
That's the real on the real, are you serious?
How you feel? How you feel?
Used to trip off that shit I was kickin' to ya
Had some fun on the run though, I'll give it to ya
But, baby, don't get it twisted (don't get it)
You was just another nigga on the hit list
Tryna fix your inner issues with a bad bitch
Didn't they tell you that I was a savage? (Ooh)
Fuck ya white horse and ya carriage (yeah)
Never told you you could have it
